name: Polymarket CLOB Market Making Skill
description: Calculates dynamic double-sided spreads (bids/asks), order-book placement depths, and inventory-risk parameters on the Polymarket CLOB order-book interface.

tools.name: calculate_market_making_spreads
tools.description: Computes recommended bid and ask prices, spread widths, and inventory risk parameters based on order book depth.

inventory.description: Current net position units (negative for short, positive for long).
